prompt: Create a computer graphics visualization using the dog's face from image 2 as the subject. Overlay abstract facial analysis landmarks or a mesh structure on the face, rendered in the simplified graphic style and limited color palette derived from image 1, illustrating facial estimation.
prompt_refined: Generate a computer graphics visualization of the dog's face from image 2 as the primary subject. Overlay abstract facial analysis landmarks or a geometric mesh structure onto the face. Render the entire image in the stark, simplified graphic style and a highly limited, monochromatic color palette, drawing inspiration from image 1. The visualization should illustrate facial estimation.
objects: facial analysis overlay (landmarks or geometric mesh)
